name: Contratos Vencendo
query:
SELECT
    name AS "Contrato:Link/Contrato 360:220",
    contratante AS "Contratante:Link/Contratante COAPH:200",
    vigencia_fim AS "Fim da Vigência:Date:120",
    DATEDIFF(vigencia_fim, CURDATE()) AS "Dias p/ Vencer:Int:120",
    status_contrato AS "Status::150",
    saude_contrato AS "Saúde::120",
    valor_mensal AS "Valor Mensal:Currency:140"
FROM `tabContrato 360`
WHERE vigencia_fim IS NOT NULL
  AND DATEDIFF(vigencia_fim, CURDATE()) <= 180
  AND status_contrato != 'Encerrado'
ORDER BY vigencia_fim ASC
